mapper.insert: INSERT INTO chat_session ( id, user_id, agent_id, title, metadata, next_turn_seq, last_completed_turn_seq, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{id}, CAST(#{userId} AS uuid), CAST(#{agentId} AS uuid), #{title}, CAST(#{metadata} AS jsonb), COALESCE(#{nextTurnSeq}, 1), COALESCE(#{lastCompletedTurnSeq}, 0), #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} )
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, agent_id, title, metadata::text AS metadata, next_turn_seq, last_completed_turn_seq, created_at, updated_at FROM chat_session WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT id, user_id, agent_id, title, metadata::text AS metadata, next_turn_seq, last_completed_turn_seq, created_at, updated_at FROM chat_session WHERE user_id = CAST(#{userId} AS uuid) ORDER BY updated_at DESC

SELECT id, user_id, agent_id, title, metadata::text AS metadata, next_turn_seq, last_completed_turn_seq, created_at, updated_at FROM chat_session WHERE agent_id = CAST(#{agentId} AS uuid) AND user_id = CAST(#{userId} AS uuid) ORDER BY updated_at DESC
mapper.update:
UPDATE chat_session
agent_id = CAST(#{agentId} AS uuid),
user_id = CAST(#{userId} AS uuid),
title = #{title},
metadata = CAST(#{metadata} AS jsonb),
next_turn_seq = #{nextTurnSeq},
last_completed_turn_seq = #{lastCompletedTurnSeq},
updated_at = NOW()
WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: UPDATE chat_session SET next_turn_seq = next_turn_seq + 1, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} RETURNING next_turn_seq - 1

UPDATE chat_session cs SET last_completed_turn_seq = COALESCE( ( SELECT MAX(candidate.turn_seq) FROM ( SELECT cm.turn_seq, cm.turn_seq - ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY cm.turn_seq) AS continuity_key FROM chat_message cm WHERE cm.session_id = cs.id AND cm.role = 'user' AND cm.turn_completed = TRUE AND cm.turn_seq > cs.last_completed_turn_seq ) candidate WHERE candidate.continuity_key = cs.last_completed_turn_seq ), cs.last_completed_turn_seq ), updated_at = NOW() WHERE cs.id = #{id} RETURNING last_completed_turn_seq
